reason: Authoritative translation checklist: glossary consistency, placeholder integrity, modifier preservation, audit-reason interpretation. Must be applied to every one of the 113 entries.
Canonical-form + idempotency contract. Translator must preserve last_changed_at semantics and ensure extract --check stays exit 0 after rewriting status=new → translated.

Background on heuristic scoring (audit.verdict=auto_ui means UI-method / path-whitelist matches). Helps translator interpret why each of the 113 was high-confidence UI and disambiguate misc_ui edge cases.
